name: Dharmik Sheth
summary: Motivated and detail-oriented Quality Assurance (QA) trainee currently pursuing B.Sc. (IT) in the final semester and gaining real-world experience through a QA internship at Curebits Techlabs. Strong foundation in manual testing, test case creation, and bug reporting, with growing knowledge of automation testing using Python and Selenium. Passionate about ensuring software quality and continuously improving testing skills.

points: Performing manual testing of web applications.
Writing and executing test cases to validate system functionality.
Identifying and reporting software bugs and issues.
Collaborating with developers to ensure product quality.
Learning automation testing using Python and Selenium alongside manual testing.

projects.name: Phone Box — E-Commerce Web Application
projects.desc: Academic project for a web-based mobile phone shopping system.
points: Designed and developed user login and registration system.
Implemented Add to Cart and Buy Now functionality.
Created CRUD operations for products, users, cart, and orders.
Performed manual testing using test cases for login, cart, and booking modules.
projects.tech: HTML, CSS, PHP, MySQL; Tools: XAMPP / WAMP
